# #12 high voc bromide ★

> CH3NH3PbBr3-sensitized cell yields a high open-circuit voltage of 0.96 V with Jsc=5.57 mA/cm2, fill factor 0.59, and PCE of 3.13%

## Derivation
- **Strategy**: support
- **Premises**:
  - [[high_voc_origin|#08 high_voc_origin]]

> [!REASONING]
> The more positive Br2/Br- redox potential expands the photovoltage range, yielding Voc close to 1.0 V
